title: Garlicky Juicy Jamaican Haddock Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry dish featuring smoked haddock, with a garlicky and juicy twist, inspired by Jamaican cuisine, and made vegan-friendly by using plant-based alternatives.

ingredients.name: smoked tofu
ingredients.notes: marinated in a mixture of soy sauce and spices

instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and saute until the onion is translucent.
Add the curry powder and thyme and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked tofu and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and scotch bonnet peppers and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with roti.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
